nasb.text: After He called the crowd to Him again, He began saying to them, “Listen to Me, all of you, and understand:

esv.text: And he called the people to him again and said to them, “Hear me, all of you, and understand:

cnv.text: 於是耶穌又把群眾叫過來，對他們說：“你們大家都要聽我說，也要明白：

ccb.text: 耶稣又召集众人，教导他们说：“我的话，你们要听明白，

csbs.text: 耶稣又召来众人，对他们说：“你们每个人都当听我说，也当领悟：
